notes: v2.5.5 - Hours now land on the right build: time logged under a project's base name no longer shows only in the All-Builds total, so every build and MTF shows its true hours and they add up to the project total. One shared hours calculation now drives Project Details, the Workforce Planner, department analytics and the cascade forecast, with overtime counted once and a per-department OT column restored to the Overview (with an Other/Unallocated row so the rows always add up). The build-hours editor shared by Project Details and the Workforce Planner was rebuilt with navigation-style department tabs, combined quoted/used/remaining totals, per-build timelines scaled to the build dates, and left-to-right auto-balancing roles. The project Gantt view is usable again - surfaced horizontal scroll, full-range bars, budgeted windows and milestones visually distinct, and crowded milestones stack into lanes or collapse into an 'N events' badge. The RP queue gains bulk-complete, range select, overdue badges and clearer guidance. Inventory storage-location and inspection-status saves are reliable again, the traveler list scrolls and positions correctly, page scrolling is steadier across screens, and the Workforce scale and timeframe controls now honor your exact selection instead of silently overriding it.
